skills.headline: International project leadership with cross-cultural execution
skills.intro: My work combines international project leadership, strategic relationship management, business development, executive stakeholder engagement, and cross-cultural communication

achievements.headline: Measurable leadership across landmark international developments

items.description: International leadership experience across the Middle East, Europe, and Asia
Led stakeholder engagement and client relationships on landmark developments with combined project values exceeding USD 5 billion
Directed multidisciplinary teams of architects, engineers, consultants, and specialists from proposal development to construction completion
Played key management roles in One Za'abeel, Tadawul Tower, Camp Nou, and E-JUST Campus
Represented Nikken Sekkei in engagements involving royal family representatives, government leaders, institutional investors, and major corporate stakeholders
Led overseas public relations initiatives, including award submissions, corporate publications, project marketing materials, and executive client tours

summary.headline: International project & business management across the Middle East, Europe, and Asia
paragraphs: I am an international project and business management professional with over 20 years of experience delivering complex developments and strategic initiatives across the Middle East, Europe, and Asia

I have extensive experience leading multinational stakeholders, managing client relationships, negotiating contracts, and coordinating large-scale projects for globally recognized developments including One Za'abeel in Dubai, Tadawul Tower in Riyadh, and Camp Nou in Barcelona

Beyond project management, I bring proven expertise in international business relations, executive-level stakeholder engagement, public relations, proposal development, and cross-cultural leadership. I have regularly represented Nikken Sekkei in interactions with government officials, royal family representatives, institutional clients, and private investors across multiple regions

about.headline: I bridge Japanese organizations and Middle Eastern stakeholders
about.intro: As a native Arabic speaker with over two decades of professional experience in Japan, I serve as a bridge between Japanese organizations and stakeholders across the Middle East and Europe
